_status: human-curated-pending-review — stances extracted from deep-dives/*.html on 2026-07-20 by the Phase-2 build work; a human should confirm each stance and quote before the Phase-6 reconciliation is treated as authoritative
_semantics: stance: positive = the deep-dive says enter; negative = do not enter; mixed = high-bar/conditional entry. expected_verdicts: the v3 build verdicts considered consistent with that stance; anything else is reported as a divergence in reconciliation.md

expectations.title: NEMT — Non-Emergency Medical Transportation
expectations.quote: Do not enter this sub-vertical. The structural case against 485991 NEMT is established by primary evidence: the largest public operator (Modivcare) filed Chapter 11 on Aug 20, 2025
